creator: ygy@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to George Mitchell from comment #4)

Hi George,

- The flag should be set at patch level, which I have demonstrated
- The changelog seems to be "news" in that repo, so the link should look like https://github.com/mozman/svgwrite/blob/master/NEWS.rst#version-142---2022-03-23 with the correct anchor. I have added it for you in this PR, please feel free to do that in future PRs.
- All these steps are not strictly mandated, however, it saves committers a lot of time by completing these steps.
